entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop being studied for hybrid breeding

entities.name: TOPCROSS HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrids based on landrace pollinator evaluated for stability and productivity

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, evaluated for stability in arid zones

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The amount of vegetative biomass produced, evaluated for stability in arid zones

entities.name: ARID ZONE
entities.description: Dry environmental conditions where the hybrids were evaluated

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist infection by Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand drought stress during the final stages of growth

entities.name: POTENTIAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The maximum yield capacity of the hybrids under high input conditions

entities.name: MALE-STERILE LINES
entities.description: A-lines used as seed parents to produce topcross hybrids

entities.name: LANDRACE TOPCROSS POLLINATOR
entities.description: The TCP used as the pollinator parent in the creation of topcross hybrids

entities.name: DROUGHT RESPONSE INDEX
entities.description: A metric used to evaluate the response of hybrids to drought stress

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The specific site in Andhra Pradesh, India where evaluations were conducted

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where Patancheru is located

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: TILLERING
entities.description: The capacity of the plant to produce side shoots

entities.name: GRAIN SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the produced grains

entities.name: GRAIN NUMBER PER PANICLE
entities.description: The quantity of grains produced on a single panicle

entities.name: GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The speed at which the plant increases in size and biomass

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total organic mass of the plant

entities.name: FERTILITY RESTORATION
entities.description: The ability of the hybrid to restore fertility for seed production

entities.name: HIGH INPUT CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions with optimal resources used to evaluate potential productivity

relationships.description: used as seed parents to produce
